interpretation.detail: β = 0.820 (< 1): failure intensity is decreasing — reliability is growing. The 95% CI on β [0.393, 1.400] includes 1 — the trend is not statistically significant. Current (instantaneous) MTBF ≈ 427.

goodness_of_fit.critical_value_method: published MIL-HDBK-189 table with linear interpolation by sample size
goodness_of_fit.decision_text: Fail to reject the power-law NHPP model at the selected significance level.

trend_test.method: Military Handbook power-law process trend test
trend_test.direction_estimator: raw MLE (context for the test statistic)
trend_test.decision_text: Fail to reject the homogeneous-Poisson no-trend hypothesis.

prediction.uncertainty_scope: conditional process uncertainty with fitted parameters held fixed
